component.name: AJAZZ Control Center
component.summary: Configure AJAZZ stream decks, keyboards and mice

description.p: AJAZZ Control Center is a modern, open, cross-platform control panel for AJAZZ (and Mirabox-OEM) devices. It supports stream decks, mechanical keyboards, and gaming mice under Linux, Windows and macOS with a single, consistent Qt 6 user interface and a Python plugin system.

ul.li: Stream decks: AKP153, AKP153E, AKP03, AKP05 and Mirabox-OEM siblings.
Keyboards: VIA-compatible AK series plus research-stage proprietary models.
Mice: AJ159, AJ199, AJ339 Pro, AJ380.
